message:
feat(e2e): add mismatch artifact bundles and concurrency showcase module

Introduce two new modules and integrate them into the batch runner for
enhanced debugging and demonstration of FrankenSQLite's MVCC advantage:

Mismatch artifacts (mismatch_artifacts.rs):
- Self-contained diagnostic bundles generated when batch runner detects
  divergence between C SQLite and FrankenSQLite
- Bundles include metadata.json, REPRO.md with copy-paste commands,
  schema/dump diffs, pragma comparison, and deterministic SQL dumps
- Size-disciplined: row-level diffs capped at configurable MAX_DIFF_ROWS
  to prevent multi-gigabyte bundles

Concurrency showcase (concurrency_showcase.rs):
- Flagship "massively concurrent writes" demo workloads that make
  FrankenSQLite's MVCC scaling advantage obvious
- Two canonical workloads: disjoint writes (pure MVCC scaling) and
  hot-page contention (maximum conflict pressure)
- Sweeps across concurrency levels with sqlite3 WAL baseline comparison

Batch runner integration:
- Added artifact_dir field to CellResult for tracking mismatch locations
- On mismatch detection, automatically writes diagnostic bundle with
  comparison report, canonicalized databases, schema snapshots, and
  cross-engine diff files
- Wired up golden verification and mismatch_artifacts module calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
